title: EuroPDX / ProXe / Cell Model Passports ingest
context: Future breadth from EuroPDX, ProXe, and Cell Model Passports can only be ingested after per-source license verification in the register (backlog; PLAN section 12). Binding cancer guardrails (PLAN section 7): open-access/aggregate/de-identified metadata only; no controlled-access (dbGaP/EGA) or patient-identifiable data; COSMIC/OncoKB reference-only (not ingested); provenance on every assertion; links only, no omics/sequence/image payloads re-hosted; no medical advice. No partner/requestor secured yet, so verifiedNeed is false.
objective: Add ingest for EuroPDX / ProXe / Cell Model Passports, normalized to the schema with provenance, only for sources verified ingestible in sources.yaml.
acceptanceCriteria: Each source's license verified and ingest:true recorded in sources.yaml before ingestion; reference-only sources excluded.
Records normalized to the schema, provenance-stamped, identifiers cross-referenced; only open metadata ingested, no payloads re-hosted.
Re-runnable, idempotent fetch with checksums + retrieval dates; reviewed by maintainer.
output: A merged PR adding EuroPDX / ProXe / Cell Model Passports ingest (post per-source license verification).
